title: Special trust fund
doc_html:
§2025.  Special trust fund

The fund shall be set aside as a special trust fund and shall be disbursed only in the manner and for the purposes provided in this Sub-part.
doc_text:
§2025.  Special trust fund
The fund shall be set aside as a special trust fund and shall be disbursed only in the manner and for the purposes provided in this Sub-part.
